top.title: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
top.summary: The US president accused Iran of "doing a very poor job" with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon to begin peace talks.

top.title: Ceasefire or no ceasefire, the Middle East's reshuffling is not yet done
top.summary: Both sides have reason to end the war but share no common ground.

top.title: Melania Trump denies ties to Jeffrey Epstein and urges hearing for survivors
top.summary: She called rumours that Epstein introduced her to Donald Trump "mean-spirited attempts to defame my reputation".

top.title: Dancer with ALS uses brainwaves to perform again through avatar
top.summary: Breanna Olson said the tech was able to re-establish the expression and connection her ALS had eroded.

top.title: White House staff told not to place bets on prediction markets
top.summary: The gambling platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making wagers on conflicts.

top.title: Mayor warns of London 'disinformation blizzard'
top.summary: Sir Sadiq Khan claims London is being targeted with disinformation portraying it as a city "in decline".

title.#text: Cloudflare made a WordPress for AI agents
